text: I feel a sharp sense of anticipation and curiosity. The quiet, dimly lit hallway gives an impression of secrecy or exclusion, as though I am on the verge of entering a hidden realm. As I move into the exhibition space, surrounded by bold colors, screens, and language about research and development, the environment shifts to one of creative energy and intellectual challenge. I feel alert, aware of my own role in an evolving landscape shaped by innovation and human-machine interaction. There is a subtle tension between isolation and discovery here.
